name: Caribou Meat Balls
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Quick oatmeal, Red River cereal, or cracker crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a mixing bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into small balls, using about 1 teaspoon of meat mixture for each ball.
3. Cook the meatballs in a skillet over medium heat in a little hot fat.
4. Turn the meatballs frequently until they are brown on all sides, 5 to 7 minutes.
5. Makes approximately 5 dozen miniature meat balls.
6. Serve with your favorite barbecue sauce and slices of unbuttered French bread.
